overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway during a heavy winter storm. The video shows continuous driving through varying road configurations including open highway sections and narrow ramps with concrete barriers, characteristic of Euro Truck Simulator gameplay.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway with overhead bridges

events.description: passing under first concrete highway overpass

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snow-covered highway, maintaining lane position and speed despite heavy snowfall

notable_agents.action: white car traveling in left lane, gradually moving ahead of the truck

entered.detail: Mercedes truck dashboard with instrument gauges, GPS navigation screen, and control panels
string of tassel decorations hanging across the top of the windshield
multi-lane highway covered in snow with visible tire tracks and lane markings
metal highway guardrails covered in snow along the left side
metal highway guardrails covered in snow along the right side
concrete highway overpass bridge spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows steady driving on a wide, snow-covered multi-lane highway during a heavy snowstorm. The truck passes under two concrete overpasses while maintaining speed alongside sparse traffic. Metal guardrails line both sides of the road, and the Mercedes dashboard is visible in the foreground with decorative tassels hanging above the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow highway ramp with high concrete noise barriers

events.description: road narrows and high concrete barrier wall appears on the left side, replacing the metal guardrail
passing a red semi-truck traveling in the left lane adjacent to the concrete barrier

agents.ego_description: navigating narrower road section with concrete barriers on the left, maintaining careful following distance from vehicles ahead

notable_agents.action: red semi-truck traveling parallel in the left lane alongside the concrete barrier wall

entered.detail: tall concrete noise barrier or bridge wall running along the left side of the road
highway sign support structure spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a narrower highway section characterized by a high concrete barrier wall on the left side, creating a more enclosed driving environment. The road continues through heavy snowfall with reduced visibility. A red semi-truck travels in the left lane alongside the concrete barrier, and an overhead sign gantry appears in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered highway with distant fields

events.description: exiting the narrow barrier section, concrete wall ends and open highway with metal guardrails resumes

agents.ego_description: continuing on open highway as the road widens, with snow-covered fields visible beyond the guardrails

entered.detail: metal highway guardrails resuming on the left side as the concrete barrier ends
open fields covered in deep snow visible beyond the left guardrail
open fields covered in deep snow visible beyond the right guardrail
highway overpass visible in the far distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The truck exits the narrow concrete barrier section and returns to the open highway configuration with metal guardrails on both sides. Snow-covered fields become visible beyond the guardrails, and the road continues straight into the distance with another overpass visible ahead. The heavy snowfall persists throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a heavy winter storm, transitioning from an open multi-lane highway into a confined corridor before returning to an expansive snowy landscape. It begins with the truck cruising under concrete overpasses on a wide road, where the Mercedes dashboard and decorative tassels are visible against a backdrop of metal guardrails and sparse traffic. As the vehicle progresses, the environment shifts into a narrower section enclosed by a high concrete barrier wall on the left, passing a red semi-truck beneath a distant overhead sign gantry. The scene then opens back up as the truck exits the walled corridor, returning to a wide highway flanked by metal guardrails. Finally, the view expands to reveal snow-covered fields stretching beyond the roadside as the truck continues straight toward another distant overpass amidst the persistent snowfall.
